projectDescription: A curated collection of llms.txt files for Nigerian fintech APIs to help LLMs understand and integrate with these platforms.
keyFeatures: LLMs.txt files for Mono open banking API
LLMs.txt files for Paystack payment API
LLMs.txt files for OPay payment gateway
LLMs.txt files for Moniepoint banking and payment services
Standardized documentation format for AI integration
Open-source contribution model for Nigerian fintech ecosystem
publicApiSurface: Mono: Financial data, payments, identity verification, and direct debit APIs
Paystack: Payment processing, transfers, subscriptions, and terminal APIs
OPay: Card payments, bank transfers, USSD, wallet, and refund APIs
Moniepoint: Collections, disbursements, reserved accounts, and invoice APIs
